note: Three end-to-end RWA flow scenarios for AttestRWA. Each scenario maps a deal context to an expected attester decision and on-chain outcome. Wallet addresses reference data/synthetic/rwa/wallets.json.

instructed_payee.legal_entity: Bangkok Landmark Group Public Co., Ltd.

reasons: Buyer wallet has no taint signals
Instructed payee wallet matches developer authorized_payee_wallets
Property and developer feed timestamps within freshness policy

scenarios.title: Siam Riverside anchor case — payee mismatch reject

buyer.profile: Same Dubai buyer, KYC tier 3 — capital is clean, payee instruction is not

reasons: Instructed payee wallet 0x90F7… not in developer authorized_payee_wallets
Legal entity 'SRL Holding 2026 Co., Ltd.' present in known_impostor_payees of siam-riverside feed
Property and capital signals are clean — only the payee is wrong

expected_on_chain_outcome.audit_log: Attestation written with payeeVerified=false; escrow refuses release; buyer can refund after expiresAt or via attester-signed refund.

scenarios.title: Off-platform buyer wallet with mixer history

buyer.profile: Wallet flagged with two-hop Tornado Cash exposure (synthetic mock)

instructed_payee.legal_entity: Bangkok Landmark Group Public Co., Ltd.

reasons: Payee instruction is valid (matches Bangkok Landmark feed)
Buyer wallet flagged red by wallet_taint mock (tornado_cash_2_hop signal)

expected_on_chain_outcome.audit_log: Attestation written with capitalClass=2 (red); escrow refuses release; refund path available.
